prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, calibrated using 503 historical daily log returns for PANW over the last ~2 years (from June 2022 to June 2024). The model estimates a daily drift of -0.0003 and daily volatility of 0.0211. The point estimate represents the median price in 21 days, while the confidence intervals reflect the probability distribution of future prices given the estimated drift and volatility.
